params.name: Imperial Lamp
params.description:
On Feb 26, 1968, the famous Imperial Lamp was found in the tomb of Dou Wan.

When the Imperial Lamp was first unearthed, its fragments were scattered all over the ground. It took several months to fully restore the lamp, including the head, base, and lampshade were repaired. The entire lamp was covered with brilliant and gorgeous gilt. It is 14 inches tall and weighs 30 catties. It also features a unique design. The palace maid can hold the lamp in one hand and cover it using her other sleeve to …
